# ISV Knowledge Base

> Volunteer IEEE Smart Village Technology Committee knowledge base — metering interoperability, meeting notes, technical reports, and open AMI/MQTT profiles. Not an official IEEE website; program site: https://smartvillage.ieee.org/

## Docs

- [AGENTS.md](https://isv.wiki/AGENTS.md): Navigation guide for AI assistants — trust hierarchy, file map, contributor rules
- [Meter vendor study](https://isv.wiki/meter-vendor-study.html): Cited vendor benchmark for village mini-grid metering
- [VMRS registers](https://isv.wiki/meter-benchmark/vmrs-registers.json): Draft Village Minimum Register Set (OBIS shortlist)
- [Northbound MQTT v0.1](https://isv.wiki/meter-benchmark/northbound-mqtt-v0.1.json): OpenAMI village meter northbound JSON/MQTT profile
- [Technical reports catalog](https://isv.wiki/technical-notes/catalog.json): Report index with provenance (Dev Labs, ISV wiki, external)
- [Agent index (DNS-AID HTTP)](https://isv.wiki/.well-known/agents/index.json): Empty agent list + links to specs (no live MCP/A2A on this host)
- [Wiki home](https://isv.wiki/): Human UI shell — prefer direct file URLs above for agents

## DNS-AID

Discovery (Cloudflare DNS, not in repo): `_index._agents.isv.wiki` HTTPS → `isv.wiki` with DNSSEC. Setup: `technical-notes/AGENT-READINESS-CLOUDFLARE.md`.

## Optional

- [GitHub source](https://github.com/overview-solutions/isv-ai-wiki): MIT-licensed repo; push to `main` deploys the site
